---
name: Propose a standards mapping
about: Suggest how Cupel should map to or interoperate with an existing standard
title: "Mapping: Cupel <> [Standard name]"
labels: standards-mapping
assignees: ""
---

## Standards mapping proposal

**Standard:**
<!-- e.g. W3C Verifiable Credentials v2.0, C2PA v2.1, Open Badges 3.0, CTDL -->

**Signal type(s) affected:**
<!-- Which Cupel signal types does this mapping touch? -->

**Proposed mapping:**
<!-- How should Cupel represent or consume data from this standard? Schema snippets welcome. -->

**Conflicts or ambiguities:**
<!-- Where does Cupel's model conflict with or duplicate the standard? -->

**References:**
<!-- Link to the standard's spec or relevant section -->
